description: Create visual evidence matrix comparing functional hypotheses for YrhB
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 7))

# Evidence comparison table - visual summary
categories = [
    'Fold assignment\n(Imm35)',
    'Bacteriocin\nimmunity',
    'Peptidase\ninhibitor',
    'Chaperone\nactivity',
    'K12 = BL21\nsequence'
]

evidence_types = {
    'Pfam/InterPro domain': [1, 0, 0, 0, 0],
    'Foldseek structural homology': [1, 0, 0, 0, 0],
    'CATH classification': [1, 0, 0, 0, 0],
    'AlphaFold high-confidence model': [1, 0, 0, 0, 0],
    'In vitro biochemical assay (PMID 22569261)': [0, 0, 0, 1, 0],
    'In vivo growth phenotype (PMID 22569261)': [0, 0, 0, 1, 0],
    'Adjacent toxin gene context': [0, -1, -1, 0, 0],
    'Genomic context (IS elements, pseudogene)': [0, -1, 0, 0, 0],
    'Current GO annotations': [0, -1, -1, -1, 0],
    'Sequence identity verification': [0, 0, 0, 0, 1],
    'Any Imm35 family experimental evidence': [0, -1, -1, 0, 0],
}

# Color map: 1=green (supports), 0=gray (no evidence), -1=red (refutes)
cmap = {1: '#4CAF50', 0: '#E0E0E0', -1: '#F44336'}
symbols = {1: '+', 0: '○', -1: '–'}

y_labels = list(evidence_types.keys())
n_rows = len(y_labels)
n_cols = len(categories)

for i, (label, values) in enumerate(evidence_types.items()):
    for j, v in enumerate(values):
        color = cmap[v]
        circle = plt.Circle((j, n_rows - i - 1), 0.35, color=color, alpha=0.8)
        ax.add_patch(circle)
        ax.text(j, n_rows - i - 1, symbols[v], ha='center', va='center', 
                fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='white' if v != 0 else 'gray')

ax.set_xlim(-0.6, n_cols - 0.4)
ax.set_ylim(-0.6, n_rows - 0.4)
ax.set_xticks(range(n_cols))
ax.set_xticklabels(categories, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_yticks(range(n_rows))
ax.set_yticklabels(list(reversed(y_labels)), fontsize=9)
ax.set_title('Evidence Matrix: YrhB Functional Assignment\n'
             'Green (+) = supports, Red (–) = refutes, Gray (○) = no evidence', 
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_aspect('equal')
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['bottom'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# Add verdict bar at bottom
verdict_colors = ['#4CAF50', '#F44336', '#F44336', '#4CAF50', '#4CAF50']
verdict_text = ['SUPPORTED', 'REFUTED', 'REFUTED', 'SUPPORTED', 'CONFIRMED']
for j in range(n_cols):
    ax.text(j, -0.5, verdict_text[j], ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8,
            fontweight='bold', color=verdict_colors[j],
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='white', 
                     edgecolor=verdict_colors[j], linewidth=2))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/evidence_matrix.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence matrix figure saved")
